task_completion.description: The Subsurface application is open with the dive log loaded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Subsurface GUI is visible on the screen, displaying a list of dives.

task_completion.description: The agent opens the 'Renumber dives' dialog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box for renumbering dives (typically accessed via the Log menu or right-click context menu) is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The starting number 43 is entered into the renumbering dialog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The number '43' is typed into the starting number input field within the renumber dialog.

task_completion.description: The dives in the log are successfully renumbered sequentially starting from 43.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main dive list in Subsurface shows the first dive numbered as 43, with subsequent dives numbered 44, 45, etc.

task_completion.description: The changes are saved to the target file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks 'Save' in the File menu, uses the Ctrl+S shortcut, or the application title bar no longer shows an unsaved changes indicator (like an asterisk) next to 'dives.ssrf'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Subsurface graphical user interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: All actions are performed within the Subsurface application window, not by running scripts or commands in a terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not edit the raw XML file directly in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like gedit, nano, vim) are used to open or modify the '/home/ga/Documents/dives.ssrf' file.

integrity.description: The agent renumbered all dives sequentially rather than just modifying a single dive.
integrity.visual_evidence: Multiple dives in the list reflect the new sequential numbering (43, 44, 45...), proving a bulk renumbering action was taken.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target file is '/home/ga/Documents/dives.ssrf'. The expected starting dive number is 43. The task requires renumbering all dives sequentially starting from 43 using the Subsurface application.
